Home.project1Desc: Discover artworks from the world's leading museums through a single unified platform.
Home.project1P1: Museum Hub is a web platform that aggregates artwork data from major museums around the world.
Home.project1P2: Through integrations with public museum APIs, users can explore collections, search for artists and artworks, and access cultural heritage from a single interface.
Home.project2Desc: Explore space missions, celestial objects, and astronomy data from leading space agencies in one place.
Home.project2P1: Sky Hub is a full-stack application that collects and consolidates information from multiple space-related APIs into a single, user-friendly experience.
Home.project2P2: The platform enables users to discover space missions, astronomical imagery, satellite data, launch schedules, and scientific insights from some of the world's leading space organizations.
Home.project3Desc: Accessible and structured hospital intake system for pediatric patients with disabilities.
Home.project3P1: Pediatric Admission Hub is a web-based system designed to support hospital staff in managing the admission process of pediatric patients with disabilities.
Home.project3P2: The system is designed to reduce friction in high-load environments while ensuring that sensitive patient data is organized and easily accessible to authorized personnel.

Skills.desc1: Foundation for modern web applications. React handles declarative and composable UIs, while Next.js adds SSR/SSG, routing, and Server Actions to reduce architectural complexity.
Skills.desc2: Chosen for high-performance systems and high concurrency workloads. Ideal for workers, pipelines, and distributed backends thanks to goroutines.
Skills.desc3: A typed layer on top of JavaScript that improves code robustness, reduces runtime errors, and enables more scalable codebases.
Skills.desc4: Used for APIs and BFF layers. Efficient for I/O-bound workloads, integrations, and lightweight services with fast development cycles.
Skills.desc5: Primary relational database. Ensures consistency, reliable transactions, and advanced querying capabilities with JSONB support for hybrid data models.
Skills.desc6: Used for flexible and evolving data models. Well suited for rapid prototyping and document-based architectures without strict schema constraints.
Skills.desc7: In-memory layer for caching, rate limiting, and fast data structures. Reduces database load and improves overall performance.
Skills.desc8: Standardizes development and production environments. Enables reproducible deployments and simplifies multi-service architecture management.

Hobbies.title: My hobbies
Hobbies.desc1: Study of classical and modern Western philosophy focused on structured reasoning and systems thinking.
Hobbies.desc2: Interest in astronomy and scientific outreach, with a focus on NASA missions and space exploration.
Hobbies.desc3: Museums, cultural travel and visual arts as a source of inspiration for design and perception.
Hobbies.desc4: Guitar practice (classical and electric), band experience and music teaching.
Hobbies.desc5: Interest in Russian and Central European literature, including Dostoevskij, Kafka, Mann and Celine.
Hobbies.desc6: Basketball and Formula 1, with attention to strategy, competition dynamics and performance.
Hobbies.desc7: European cinema and investigative films with strong narrative and social focus.
Hobbies.desc8: Historical analysis as a tool to understand complex systems and societal evolution.
